seed_data_creation: Used existing game: Lakers vs Celtics (share_code: ed00a90f)
context_for_next_testing_agent: LiveView roster merge fix is working. The mergeRosterWithStats function correctly combines roster players with their stats, showing 0 values for players without recorded stats.

both_teams_display_regardless_of_player_.description: Lakers (3 players) and Celtics (2 players) both display correctly
